name: Whisperwind
description: Gains Mana and increased cooldown speed while moving. If there are teammates nearby, also gains Movement Speed.

name: Hurricane Wall
description:
Conjures a barrier around herself, knocking back enemies and dealing damage. Enemies that touch the barrier take damage and are stunned. Teammates within the barrier gain crowd control immunity.
Untargetable while channeling.

name: Child of the Sea
description: Loss of life is temporarily stored in a gray shield form, during which 40%/15% of the equivalent gray shield of damage dealt to heroes/non-heroes is converted into blood, scaling up based on extra life. Basic attacks come with additional physical damage.

name: Wavewalking
description: Endeavor to jump up and deal physical damage to smashed enemies when you land. Afterwards, bounce up again, dealing the same damage as well as a 0.5 second knockback effect when you land. Immunity to control during the jump. When attacking multiple enemies at once, damage decays by 20% for each additional enemy, down to 60%. Increases damage to minions by an additional 30%.

name: Sea Anchor
description: Throw the anchor straight out to hit enemies in front of you, dealing physical damage and 60% slow for 1.5 seconds. If the anchor is embedded in a wall, Ata will use the force to dash himself and the enemy to that spot. When it hits the wall, it deals Physical damage and stuns for 0.5 seconds. [Passive]: after using [Anchor], the next basic attack within 3 seconds will pull the enemy back with the anchor.

name: Ghost Ship
description: Ata builds temporary terrain along the outer border of a fan-shaped targetarea, dealing damage to enemies within it.Gains crowd control immunity while using the skill.He can use the skill again to make the temporary terrain disappear early.

name: Assassination
description: Butterfly gains 2 stacks of mark from defeating heroes and 1 stack fromassisting or killing monsters/minions. At 3 stacks, the next skill used willnot enter cooldown.

name: Whirlwind
description: Butterfly deals damage to enemies around her and gains a shield. HerMovement Speed increases during this time.

name: Sword Propel
description: Butterfly deals damage in the target direction and inflicts slow.

name: Death Dealer
description: Butterfly jumps to the target and deals damagelf the target is defeated within a certain period of time, the cooldown of thisskill is refreshed.

name: Wish of the Living
description: Devara's Basic Attacks grant Energy. Becomes enhanced and gains another basic skill chance upon reaching the limit.

name: Millennium Echo
description: Gains crowd control immunity and a Movement Speed boost. Upon landing, enhances Basic Attack. Basic Attacks grant Energy.

name: Only the Strong (Fatih)
description: Enhance Recovery Whenever he uses a skill, gains an enhanced Basic Attack that unleashes sword energy. Enhanced Basic Attacks have higher Attack Speed and restore Health. While using Sacred Tree Blessing, enhanced Basic Attacks unleash 1 additional blast of sword energy.

name: The King's Blade
description: Damage Movement Crowd Control Dashes forward to deal damage. The 3rd skill use also launches the enemy.

name: The King's Return
description: Damage Slow Unleashes sword energy, dealing damage to enemies and slowing them. Recovers Health if he hits a hero. While using Sacred Tree Blessing, he unleashes 1 additional blast of sword energy.

name: Sacred Tree Blessing
description: Enhance Purify Recovery Removes all crowd control effects on himself, dealing physical damage to nearby enemies and gaining max Health. Boosts the effects of Skill 2 and enhanced Basic Attacks while this skill is active. Tap again to end the skill.

name: Shuffle
description: After leaving combat or touching a bouquet, enhances the next Basic Attack to include a dash and deal extra damage. If the attack hits a hero, recovers Health. He can dash again after the initial dash.

name: Gentlemen's Duel
description: Dashes forward and marks the first target, increasing their damage taken, then scatters bouquets. While the skill is active, recovers twice as much Health and gains crowd control immunity. He can dash again after the initial dash.

name: Flow of the World
description:
Can change Flow states at the Base to enhance stats.
Spends 1 stack of Flow to perform an enhanced Basic Attack that deals area damage.

name: Convergence
description:
Channels the Flow, reducing the cooldown of other skills by 50%. Also gains 5–9 stacks of Flow based on the number of nearby heroes and minions and recovers Health based on Flow stacks.
Damages and knocks back nearby enemies (without applying crowd control).

name: Flow Formation
description:
Deals damage and slows enemies within range, then deals damage over time.
Using the skill repeatedly within a short time enhances it, dealing damage and launching or stunning enemies. When new magic circles overlap with the initial one, they increase its damage and refresh its duration.
Can spend 4 stacks of Flow to use the skill without triggering cooldown.

name: Arcane Arts
description:
Continuously channels a beam to deal damage over time.
While the beam is linked with a hero, continuously throws Energy Bombs that deal area damage.
Can spend 5 stacks of Flow to stop the skill from entering cooldown after this use.

name: Flow of the World
description:
Can change Flow states at the Base to enhance stats.
Vitality: Increases max Health and Physical and Magical Defense.
Piercing Heart: Increases max Health and Physical Attack.
Haste: Increases max Health and Movement Speed.
Focus: Increases max Health and Cooldown Reduction.
Spend 1 stack of Flow to perform an enhanced Basic Attack and deal damage and gain recovery.

name: Convergence
description:
Channels the Flow, reducing the cooldown of other skills by 50%. Also gains 5–9 stacks of Flow based on the number of nearby heroes and minions and recovers Health based on Flow stacks.
Damages and knocks back nearby enemies (without applying crowd control).

name: Power From Within
description:
Charges at the target and slashes, dealing damage, launching enemies, and gaining a shield.
Using the skill continuously over a short time converts it to Clearing Slash and Rifting Slash.
If the skill is not on cooldown, spend 4 stacks of Flow to stop it from entering cooldown after use.

name: All In
description:
Leaps to the target location and attacks, dealing damage and launching enemies.
If the skill is not on cooldown, spend 5 stacks of Flow to stop it from entering cooldown after this use.

name: Keen Feathers
description: Damage Basic Attacks can pierce and deal damage to enemies in their path.

name: Arrows of Gold
description: Damage Slow Conjures an arrow formation that deals continuous damage to targets within range while slowing them.

name: Golden Winged Blessing
description: Speed Up Shield Damage Gains Movement Speed and a shield while dealing damage to nearby enemies.

name: Wings of Judgment
description: Damage Speed Up Sends arrows surging forward, dealing damage. Using the skill again shoots all remaining arrows, damaging nearby enemies, inflicting them with Dread, and removing all Physical Attack bonuses granted by their equipment.

name: Sea Beast's Favor
description: Enhance Increases the Physical and Magical Defense of himself and the teammate with the lowest Health nearby.

name: Torrential Blade
description: Damage Imperil Damages and slows enemies within range.

name: Island's Blessing
description: Crowd Control Damage Movement Dashes in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies in his path and launching them.

name: Raging Sea

name: Eternal
description: Skill 2 or Ultimate hits also damage units near the target.

name: Darkness Falls
description: Flies toward the projectile.

name: Serpent's Envoy
description: Basic Attacks unleash serpent blades to deal damage, reducing Skill 1's cooldown for every enemy hit.

name: Deadly Fang
description: Activates a serpent blade and gains Movement Speed. She can quickly scale walls should she run into them during this period.

name: Furtive Attack
description: Summons the Fire Serpent at the target location, which then moves toward her, damaging and slowing enemies in its path. If serpent blades are active, it deals additional damage to enemies. If not, the cooldown is reduced.

name: Blazing Glare
description: Releases the Fire Serpent in the target direction, dealing damage and blinding enemies in its path, and gains a serpent blade. During this time, both attacking and being attacked will accumulate Fury. At full Fury, deals area damage and launches enemies.

name: Mountain Encounter
description: Replaces Recovery with Release. Upon releasing monsters, they grant her Gold, EXP, and their respective blessing. Her Basic Attacks drop Seed Mines around enemy targets.

name: Wild Growth
description: Grants Movement Speed and Health recovery to allied units in the target area. Additionally, she gains Attack Speed and summons multiple monsters at the center.

name: Tumble, Furball!
description: Rolls forward, dealing damage to nearby enemies. Gains immunity against 1 hard crowd control, and damages and launches enemies hit.

name: Seed Mines
description: Agudo rolls forward and enhances her next Basic Attack to drops 3 Seed Mines and deal Physical Damage.

name: Gorge Mobilization
description: Summons Furball to leap to the target location, inflicting damage and crowd control. Furball then fights independently.

name: Recall
description: Recall Furball

name: Rebellious Little Hawk
description: Alessio's Basic Attacks deal area damage, plus extra physical damage.

name: Upgraded Shell
description: Enhances his next 3 Basic Attacks, which deal extra physical damage in a greater area.

name: Legendary Hero Debut
description: Throws a smoke bomb, creating a cloud of smoke that grants Stealth toteammates within it, including himself. The bomb's explosion sends himairborne, and his Basic Attacks allow him to stay airborne longer.

name: Sunset Fireworks Show
description: Leaps into the air and fires several shells, each shell dealing physical damage to the target in the area. Up to 1 enemy can take a shell for the target.

name: Howling Blade
description: Basic Attacks and skills grant Fury, which increases his Physical and Magical Pierce and grants damage reduction. At max Fury, he recovers Health, and the lower his Health, the more he recovers.

name: Meteor Kill
description: Based on how many stacks of mark he has, Allain deals damage multiple times in the target direction and launches enemies. He gains marks by hitting enemies with Basic Attacks and Ultimate.

name: Moonlight Flash
description: Dashes in the target direction, damaging and slowing enemies. He gains Movement Speed and his next 3 Basic Attacks gain increased Attack Speed.

name: Death at Sunset
description: Allain leaps toward the targeted enemy hero and becomes untargetable. After a short delay, he lands and deals area damage. For every enemy hero hit, he gains marks and Fury.

name: Flame Incantation
description: Every time she damages an enemy with a skill, she increases her Movement Speed, and the enemy will take more damage from her subsequent skills.

name: Scorching Barrage
description: Unleashes fireballs at the target area that deals multi-phase damage toenemy heroes.

name: Chaos Cinder
description: Hurls a fireball at the target location that turns into a firestorm when it hitsan enemy or reaches its max range, slowing and dealing damage to nearbyenemies.Any enemy that is hit directly by the fireball is stunned.

name: Blazing Brilliance
description: Channels a blazing beam in the target direction, dealing damage over timeGains a shield and immunity while the shield is active.

name: Hidden Dragon
description: The Dragon Souls from his last 2 skill uses grant effects to his Basic Attacks, which deal physical damage to up to two enemies. He gains 1 mark upon using skills, for up to 3 marks. Basic Attacks expend all marks for various effects, striking once per mark.

name: Flaming Palm
description: Deals physical damage and true damage. Attaches a Fire Dragon Soul to his sword. Basic Attacks deal more damage when this Soul is attached. Enhanced Basic Attacks will deal both physical damage and true damage.

name: Downpour
description: Deals physical damage and recovers Health upon hit. Attaches a Water Dragon Soul to his sword. Basic Attacks restore Health and Mana when this Soul is attached. Enhanced Basic Attacks will deal physical damage and restore Health, but restore less for hits on non-hero units.

name: Riding the Wind
description: Gains Movement Speed that diminishes over time, deals physical damage, and knocks back enemies. Attaches a Wind Dragon Soul to his sword. Gains Movement Speed while this Soul is attached, 50% extra if on both swords. Enhanced Basic Attacks will deal physical damage and knock back enemies.

name: Infinite Vastness
description: Soars into the sky for up to 4.5s, then dives forward to damage and slow enemies. Landing deals equal damage and applies Dread. Gains Attack Speed and Attack Range. Basic Attacks hit 2 more enemies. Can switch Dragon Souls mid-flight.

name: Kiss of Death
description: Attacks launched from the front of the target will not crit, but backstabs are guaranteed to crit.

name: Arclight
description: Arke attacks twice in a row, dealing physical damage.

name: Untouchable
description: Arke dashes forward and attacks, marking an enemy while dealing physical damage and gaining Attack Speed. Attacking marked targets slows them and reduces this skill's cooldown. She takes less damage from marked targets.

name: Phantom Dance
description: Enters stealth, gaining a Movement Speed boost and Health recovery. Enhances attack after exiting stealth, granting extra Movement Speed boost when dealing damage, and refreshes all skill cooldowns with defeats and assists.

name: Falling Leaves
description: Basic Attack hits place marks on the target. At max marks, damage is dealt to them.Using skills grants a follow-up Basic Attack.Gains Move Speed and reduces attack interval while parasol is away.

name: Lithe Step
description: Shifts in the target direction.

name: Maple Dance
description: Knocks down nearby projectiles within a certain range and deals 2 strikes ofdamage to the enemy.

name: Autumn Storm
description: Knocks back enemies in the target area and deals damage

name: Holy Vanguard
description: Invokes the protection of the divine light to recover Health continuously. If Movement Speed is impaired, the Health restored is doubled.

name: Valiant Charge
description: Enhances the next Basic Attack into a dash, dealing extra damage and silencing enemies.

name: Whirling Strike
description: Deals damage over time to nearby enemies.

name: Might of Excalibur

name: Divine Awakening

name: Immovable Aegis

name: Soul Resonance
description: Basic Attacks can connect to an enemy's soul, dealing damage continuously unless the enemy breaks free. When the connection ends, it deals a large amount of damage.

name: Path of Passing
description: Slashes open a path to the afterlife, dealing damage to enemies hit. The path accelerates when it hits walls or the Life-Death Border, then deals extra damage. By traversing on the path, he can ignore terrain and gain Movement Speed. Hitting a wall for the first time generates an afterlife bridge, and he gains Movement Speed when crossing the bridge while enemies nearby are slowed. Using this skill again causes him to enter the Seer State.

name: Death's Precipice
description: Deals damage and inflicts slow on enemies to the front, then generates a Life-Death Border which damages, slows, and marks enemies who touch it. His next Basic Attack additionally attacks up to 3 marked targets, dealing extra damage and recovering his Health.

name: Conductor of Souls
description: Descends from the sky, damaging and knocking back nearby enemies. Hitting an enemy hero will recover his Health and summon their spirit counterpart to assist him. Enters the Seer State after, in which his Basic Attacks will kill targets with low Health instantly.

name: Reaper's Revenge
description: Enhance Speed Up Gains Energy when dealing or taking damage, increasing his Movement Speed and enhancing his recovery effects.

name: Blood Echo
description: Damage Recovery Deals damage to nearby enemies and recovers Health. Charging up will boost the skill's effects. '''Passive:''' When taking damage, there is a chance to automatically trigger Skill 1.

name: Deathscythe

name: Lay Waste

name: Fearless Chariot
description: Accumulates charge when Basic Attacks or unenhanced skills land hits, for up to 3 bars of charge.While having at least 1 bar, Basic Attack hits recover Health.Using Skill 1, the Ultimate, or an enhanced Basic Attack from Skill 2 will spend 1 bar.

name: Electrifying Charge
description: Swings his weapon twice in the target direction, dealing damage andrecovering Health with every hit.While charged, deals more damage and recovers more Health.

name: Storm Strike
description: Dashes in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies in his path whilegaining an enhanced Basic Attack that deals damage and slows targetsWhile charged, the next Basic Attack deals more damage, and the sloweffect is changed to a launch effect.

name: Force Field Suppression

description: Periodic Passive Effect: Restores Health and gains a Movement Speedbonus when taking damage.

description: Continuously restores Health to nearby allies in range while gaining

name: Tune of Tranquility

name: Hunting
description: Whenever he moves through brush, gains Movement Speed and enhances his next Basic Attack to a double shot that deals extra damage. Leaps when emerging from brush.

name: Soaring Signal
description: Leaps into the air, gaining Movement Speed and allowing him to traverse terrain. While airborne, his Basic Attack fires a powerful arrow, dealing physical damage and knocking back enemies.

name: Lupine Trap

name: Leader Stance
description: Summons wolf spirits and gains the ability to shoot while moving. Also boosts Physical Attack, Movement Speed, and Attack Speed for 8s.

name: SPLASH FOUNT (Follow-up)

name: POWER GRADATION (Follow-up)
description: '''Follow-up skill:''' Carves a seven-pointed star more quickly, dealing damage and slowing enemies. Gains crowd control immunity and damage reduction while the skill is active. When the star is formed, deals extra damage and launches enemies in the center.

name: Forge Inheritor
description: Basic Attacks restore Health and switch her weapons and combat forms. When hitting enemies with Basic Attacks or skills, she gains Attack Speed.

name: Peak-Crushing Polearm
description: Dashes in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies in her path and launching them.

name: World-Splitting Spear
description: Thrusts forward in the target direction, dealing damage, knocking enemies back, and recovering Health.

name: Return of the Armsmaster
description: Enhances herself, gaining Movement Speed and Attack Speed, and breaking the Fighting Spirit stack limit. Her Basic Attacks will also deal extra damage, and she will be able to use them while moving.

name: Through the Clouds
description: lgnores terrain after reaching level 4 and gains Movement Speed when usingBasic Attacks. Enemies hit by his Basic Attacks or skills take damage whenthey move.

name: Cloud Descending
description: Charges up, gaining Movement Speed. Then dashes forward, damaging andstunning enemies. Can jump back if he hits a hero.

name: Law of Infinity
description: Grants a Movement Speed boost to herself and a nearby teammate. Thetides created by her skills deal extra damage when they overlap

name: Leaping Koi Tide

name: Severing Surge
description: Launches and damages enemies along a line, leaving a tide that deals

name: Captivate
description: Skill hits reduce the enemy's Magical Defense (up to 3 stacks).

name: Soul Impact
description: Unleashes a shockwave in the target direction, dealing damage.

name: Strike a Pose
description: Casts a love spell at the target, dealing damage and stunning them.

name: Heartbreaker
description: Deals damage to random enemies within range 5 times.

description: When using skills, he gains Physical and Magical Defense,as well as enhanced basic atacks that inflict extra damage and slow.

name: Formlessness Mantra
description: Dashes forward, dealing damage to enemies and crowd controling them.

name: Enlightenment Mantra
description: Damages enemies in front of him and recovers health

name: Truth Mantra
description: Damages nearby enemies and knocks them back.If an enemy is knocked back into a wall , they take extra damage and are stunned.

name: Swift Justice
description: Basic atacks add stacks,with each stack granting extra atack speed and movement speed.

description: Flings tokens at a target area in a fan shape,dealing damage.Pasive> After 2 basic atacks,the next gains a random enhancement

description: Jumps to the target,damaging and slowing them while enhancing himself.While enhanced,deals extra true damage to enemies.

name: Explosion of Fragrance

name: Returning Lotus
description: Sends out a lotus in a direction that returns to her when it reaches its max distance, damaging enemies in its path.

name: Petals in the Wind
description: Dashes in the target direction, during which she is untargetable. Launches orbs to attack nearby enemies, dealing damage and reducing the cooldown of Skill 2.

name: Flowery Potential
description: Diaochan conjures up a magic circle around her, which lasts for a period oftime. While she is within the circle, the cooldowns of Skill 1 and Skill 2 aresped up. The circle deals damage to enemies within it when it is generatedand when it expires.

name: Mermaid's Gift
description: Dolia takes on mermaid form when in water (rivers are also considered water), reducing the slows taken by 50% and returning life and mana every second. The mermaid form's Basic Attacks will shoot water arrows for ranged damage. Dolia's [Recovery] is replaced with [Mermaid's Gift], which allows her to create a pact with a selected teammate, and prioritizes her pacted teammate when using [Celestial Melody].

name: Ode
description: Dolia chants 4 sound waves that spread outward, the first 3 dealing spell damage and 10% slow. The 4th deals more spell damage and 50% slow for 1 second. The sound waves also echo when they hit an enemy, dealing spell damage to those they touch and, if released in water, sending waves of water knocking back nearby enemies (knockback of enemies around you has a stun effect). Non-heroic units provoke a much smaller echo, dealing only 50% of the damage.

name: Wavemaker
description: Lam enters “Submerged” state, greatly increasing his Movement Speed for 3 seconds. When the duration ends, Lam leaps out of the water, immediately restoring 50% of this skill’s cooldown. While in Submerged state, casting the skill again will cause Lam to surface early, dealing 300 (+120% Bonus Physical Attack) Physical Damage to nearby enemies and slowing their Movement Speed by 50% for 1.5 seconds. Passive: While in river terrain, the Submerged state has no time limit. If an enemy hero with below 30% Health appears within 1500 range, Lam gains 450 Movement Speed.

name: Celestial Melody
description: After Dolia briefly chants, refresh the skill with the longest current cooldown of a friendly within range, taking more cooldown from yourself. If a teammate's skill is not used after being refreshed, [Celestial Melody]'s cooldown recovery speed can be accelerated by 20/30/40%. Teammates do not consume Mana or Energy when using the skill for 5 seconds after the skill is refreshed, and the beatdown benefit caused by the skill is split equally with Dolia. Refreshing skills for contracted teammates is prioritized, followed by non-contracted teammates, or refreshing your own skills if there are no teammates nearby. Failure to refresh a skill returns most of the cooldown of [Celestial Melody].

name: Soul Sacrifice
description: Every time a dark orb passes through an enemy, it damages and restores Health to him.

name: Eclipse
description: Deals damage to enemies in range and summons a dark orb. Donghuang can have up to have 3 dark orbs at a time. Hitting enemies with this skill reduces its cooldown.

name: Dark Impact
description: Unleashes up to 3 dark orbs at the target location, increasing own Movement Speed and dealing damage to enemies in range. The 1st and 2nd dark orbs slow enemies. The 3rd dark orb stuns enemies.

name: Forsaken Contract
description: Suppresses an enemy hero and summons 3 dark orbslf he or the target is damaged during suppression, the other will take thesame amount of damage.

name: Malicious Practice
description: Damage from skills and Basic Attacks places up to 5 marks on enemies each stack dealing damage over time.Chemist's Skill 2 and Ultimate grant up to 5 marks to himself and histeammates, continually restoring Health with each stack.

name: Deadly Panacea
description: Throws a vial of deadly poison at the target location, dealing damage overtime and slowing enemies within range.Deadly Panacea: Can store up to three vials.

name: Fatal Diagnosis

name: Master of Life

name: Unyielding Might
