name: Gale's Benediction
description: Deals damage to enemies in range and grants shieldEnhances the next 3 Basic Attacks, dealing extra true damageEvery enhanced Basic Attack reduces the cooldown of Unruly Blade

name: Unruly Blade
description: Tosses his chain blade in the target location, stunning and dealing damageto enemies hit.When max range is reached or an enemy is hit, the chain blade will pullXiahou Dun to its location, dealing damage to nearby enemies

name: Melodic Swing
description: Enhances her next Basic Attack periodically to swing toward the enemy, dealing damage and knocking them back, then jumping back. When any hero receives Blessing of Fate or Bitter Reconciliation, she earns Gold and reduces the preparation time of her enhanced Basic Attack.

name: Heartlink
description: Blesses a teammate and restores Health. When two blessed teammates come close, they recover Health and gain Movement Speed. If she blesses an already blessed teammate, she will dash to them, and both recover Health and gain Movement Speed. Can use this skill again within 5s.

name: Bitter Farewell
description: Marks an enemy, exposes them and deals continuous damage. When two marked enemies come close, they stop taking damage. If she uses the skill on a marked enemy, she will dash to them, immobilizing them and dealing continuous damage. Can use this skill again within 5s.

name: Destined Encounter
description: Commands a swarm of wisps to fly forward, blessing and granting Health recovery to teammates, while marking and damaging enemies.

name: Elf Dance
description: Her Basic Attack grants Energy. At max Energy, she speeds up, gains a stack of Laurel, and enhances her next Basic Attack. The speed-up increases with her Magical Attack. Her Pierce and Lifesteal stats are linked, using whichever is higher.

name: Dance - Leaf Greeting
description: Shoots a leaf to deal damage and gain marks. The leaf then forms a circle, damaging and slowing enemies. Magical Attack reduces the skill's cooldown.

name: Twirl - Forest Whisper
description: Recovers full Energy and gains marks, immunity to slow, and Attack Speed.

name: Waltz - Laurel Bloom
description: This skill is unlocked when Erin gains enough Laurels. She consumes Laurels to deal damage and gain Movement Speed, while reducing the cooldown of Skill 2.

name: Going Undercover
description: Periodically reveals a random enemy hero within range.Attacks on monsters deal extra true damage.

name: Target Sighted
description: Marks the target enemy while gaining attack speed and range. Attacks on marked targets stack more marks, increasing mark damage. When marks expire or reach max stacks, they explode, dealing area damage.

name: Wheel Away
description: Dashes in the target direction, slowing and dealing damage to enemies in his path. He is untargetable while dashing. Scorches the ground along the way, slowing and dealing damage to enemies in range.

name: Bladestorm
description: Throws his blade to the target location,dealing damage over time and slowing enemies wihin range.

name: Jade Carriage - View from Above
description: Can jump onto and walk on natural walls while gaining Movement Speed. Basic Attack becomes ranged while on a wall.

name: Jade Chase - Returning Strike
description: Dashes, dealing damage to enemies in his path and launching them. Enhances his next 2 Basic Attacks. Enhanced Basic Attacks deal extra damage and restore Health.

name: Stepping on Jade
description: Jumps onto the target wall.

name: Hardened Jade Seal
description: Deals damage and marks nearby enemies. Using the skill again unleashes 4 strikes of damage and restores his Health. If a marked enemy's Health is below a certain threshold, the last strike deals grievous damage. When on a wall, he can use this skill to jump down.

name: Flow of the World
description:
Channels the Flow into the body to gain Attack Speed and enhance one of four stats: Health/Attack/Movement Speed/Cooldown.
Can spend Flow to perform an enhanced Basic Attack that deals piercing physical damage.

name: Convergence
description: Deals physical damage to nearby enemies and knocks them back. Gains Health recovery, 5 stacks of Flow, and reduces the cooldown of Arrow of No Retreat and Arrowstorm.

name: Arrow of No Retreat
description: Shoots an enormous projectile at the target, dealing physical damage and knocking back non-hero units. Can dash a short distance after use.

name: Arrowstorm
description: Shoots multiple light projectiles at the target area, dealing physical damage and gaining Movement Speed.

name: Ancient Wisdom
description: After landing 5 Basic Attacks, he becomes enhanced. While enhanced, he gains Attack Speed and Movement Speed. Each Basic Attack deals extra true damage and reduces the cooldown of Skill 1 and Skill 2.

name: Corporal Punishment
description: Swings his ferule in the target direction, pulling enemies in its path to his location while dealing damage and slowing them.

name: Intuition
description: Enhances himself. While enhanced, he reflects every enemy hero's 1st Basic Attack and slows them. Passive: Basic Attacks have a chance of turning into 2 consecutive Basic Attacks. Passive: Each basic attack has a 25% chance to strike twice, with the second attack dealing 50% damage and applying on-hit effects.

name: Sage's Might
description: Charges in the target direction, dealing damage to the 1st enemy hero hit and restricting their movement to a fixed area for a while. Restricted targets deal less damage.

name: Forever Entwined
description: Basic Attacks deal extra damage.Flying Sword hits apply Sword Energy to targets, and Flying Swords dealextra damage to targets marked with Sword Energy.

name: Guard Her Grave
description: Launches Splitting Sword and moves backwards, knocking back the enemyand dealing damage while reducing their Magical Defense.

name: Coupled Blades - Short
description: Launches a Flying Sword, dealing damage to enemies in its path.

name: Coupled Blades - Long
description: Launches a Flying Sword, dealing damage to enemies in its path.

name: Freshly Forged
description: Immediately refreshes and enhances Flying SwordPassive: Increases field of vision. Each time a flying sword hits an enemy,the cooldown of Freshly Forged is reduced.

name: Guitar Solo
description: For every 3 Basic Attacks or skills Gao uses, his Basic Attack is enhanced,dealing damage on hit.

name: Wild Chord
description: Launches musical notes that bounce between enemies, dealing damage.

name: String Bender
description: Damages and slows enemies within range. Hits on heroes restore Health, and he gains damage reduction during the dash.

name: Rock Out!
description: Gains Movement Speed and damage reduction while dealing continuous damage to enemies within range.

name: Secret Skill - Rush
description: When an enemy is within a certain range from Prince of Lanling, moving toward them will grant him increased Movement Speed.

name: Secret Skill - Split
description: Deals damage to enemies within a certain range, and deals a 2nd strike of damage to a random enemy in range.

name: Secret Skill - Sling
description: Throws a dagger that damages, slows, and marks the first enemy in its path. When attacking marked targets, stuns them and recovers Health. Marks deal grievous damage when disappearing.

name: Secret Skill - Strike
description: Exits stealth mode and dashes in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies in his path.

name: Secret Skill - Shadow
description: Gao Changgong enters stealth and gains increased movement speed. His next basic attack after exiting stealth deals bonus physical damage and slows the target.

name: Piercing Arrow
description: Deals double damage to shields with Basic Attacks and skills.

name: Enchanted Arrows
description: ;On: Range and Basic Attack interval increase. Basic Attack costs Mana and deals damage over time. ;Off: Gains Movement Speed and restores range and Basic Attack interval toinitial values.Basic Attack hits restore Mana.

name: Silent Arrow
description: Fires an arrow in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies hit while silencing and slowing them. After a brief delay, deals another strike of damage to enemies within range of the same location.

name: Sphere of Purity
description: Damages enemies in range. Gains Attack Speed and Critical Rate when in the magic circle.Use this skill again to grant Critical Rate and Move Speed to teammates in the circle and damage enemies in the circle

name: Rider of Triumph
description: '''Normal Stance:''' Moving constantly accumulates a Movement Speed bonus, and reaching a certain distance activates the Charge Stance. '''Charge Stance:''' Enhances the next skill and Basic Attack.

name: Heroic Charge
description: '''Normal Stance:''' Deals damage to enemies within range. '''Charge Stance:''' Charges forward, knocking back enemies in his path while dealing damage.

name: Soaring Green Dragon
description: '''Normal Stance:''' Removes crowd control effects and gains Movement Speed. '''Charge Stance:''' Removes crowd control effects and leaps forward, knocking back enemies within the landing area and dealing damage.

name: Razor Cavalry
description: '''Normal Stance:''' Enhances himself, reducing the movement distance required to enter Charge stance. '''Charge Stance:''' Summons heavy cavalry that dash forward, dealing damage and knocking back enemies in their path.

name: The Laws of Nature
description: Slips out of vision and enhances the next Basic Attack to inflict extra damage and slow.

name: Prophecy - Hidden Hand
description: Gains a Movement Speed boost and a disguise, reducing the Physical andMagical Defense of enemies touched and dealing damage to them.

name: The Animist
description: Summons sprites, and after a brief delay, pulls nearby enemies, inflicting damage and stun. When an enemy hero is hit, gains a shield and grants ashield to all nearby allies.

name: Prophecy - Out of Sight
description: After 1s, he grants disguise and Move Speed to himself and near by teammates. Gains vision of the nearest enemy hero. Disguise breaks upon using Basic Attacks, skills, or actions that affect enemies.

name: Killing Spear
description: Han Xin's every 4th Basic Attack launches the target. Hits from skills andenhanced Basic Attacks grant increased Attack Speed.

name: Ruthless Assault
description: Charges to the target location to deal damage and launch the enemy. The 2nd charge will not launch the enemy.

name: Fight or Die!
description: Shifts backward and enhances the next Basic Attack, causing it to deal extra damage.

name: The Unrivaled Spear
description: Swings spear 4 times, gaining immunity to damage and crowd control. Deals damage each time and launches enemies the 4th time.

name: Moon's Farewell
description: MarkEnhance Spends moon crystals to use skills. When all moon crystals have been spent, her Skill 1 and Skill 2 will enter their (full) cooldowns, and her next Basic Attack is enhanced, dealing extra damage. Skill 1 and Skill 2 apply a mark on hit. Hitting marked targets again triggers additional effects.

name: Crescent Wave
description: Damage Unleashes a beam of moonlight, dealing damage. Deals extra damage if a mark is triggered.

name: Wayward Rays
description: ShieldCrowd Control Releases orbs to deal damage while gaining a shield and increased Movement Speed. If mark are triggered, targets will be stunned.

name: Moonscape Mirage
description: DreamscapeCooldownShield Links to a hero, gaining damage reduction while linked. After a delay, they enter a mirage. Upon entering, she gains a shield, and her skill cooldowns are shorter. If she uses this skill again while inside the mirage, she moves 700 units away from the target.

name: Fate's Guidance
description: Heino's Basic Attacks differ depending on whether he's in melee or ranged mode. Basic Attacks deal physical and magical damage, and melee Basic Attacks and skills place marks on hit enemies.

name: Scepter of Fate
description: Reduces cooldown by 0.2s for each marked enemy hit, up to 1s. ;Ranged: Throws scepter to deal magical damage and again to marked targets forward. ;Melee: Throws scepter to damage and slow enemies. Recovers Health on hitting marked enemies.

name: Leap of Fate
description: Dashes forward. lf there are enemy heroes near the end of the dash, goesinto melee mode, recovers Health, and increases Max Health, Physical Defense and Magical Defense. Otherwise, goes into ranged mode and gains Movement Speed.

name: Fate Rewind
description: Heino gains damage reduction and crowd control immunity, recovers Health, but cannot move. After 1.5s, he deals magical damage and travels back in time. The allied tower within range travels 5s back in time. He recovers more Health the less he has left.

name: Chastising Shot
description: Basic Attack hits grant Attack Speed and 1 stack of enhancement.At 3 stacks, enhanced Basic Attacks shoot 3 arrows, dealing more totaldamage than a regular Basic Attack.

name: Arrow Volley
description: Enhances Basic Attacks for 5s to deal heavy damage. At the same time, HouYi shoots arrows to hit two other enemies in front of him, dealing 50%damage.

name: Afterglow
description: Inflicts damage and slow on enemies in the target area while also gaining vision of the area.

name: Burning Sun Arrow
description: Fires an arrow in the target direction. Deals AoE damage upon hitting a hero inflicting stun and slow.

name: Gunner's Spirit
description: Basic Attacks increase attack and Critical Rate

name: Unleash Your Potential
description: Gains Movement Speed and permanently increased attack. Cast while in Cannon form to immediately exit the state.

name: Lay the Mines
description: Places a trap in the target area. The trap grants vision of enemies that touchit, while also inflicting damage, slow, and Sunder on them and granting Huang Zhong a shield.

name: Bring out the Artillery
description: Huang Zhong dashes for a certain distance and deploys a turret while refreshing his Skill 1. He becomes immobile, gains range and Physical and Magical Defense Basic Attacks deal area damage.The turret will be deactivated after a certain number of Basic Attacks.

name: Lethal Reflections
description: Jing and her image apply 2 different types of marks on enemies when they deal damage. If an enemy has both types of mark at the same time, they take damage and the cooldowns of Skill 1 and Skill 2 are reset.

name: Reflective Assault
description:
Dashes forward, damaging enemies in her path and slowing them while enhancing her next Basic Attack.
If no mirror image is present on the battlefield, one will be created to fight alongside her.

name: Shattered Illusions
description:
Deals damage to nearby enemies while recovering Health and gaining increased Movement Speed.
If no mirror image is present on the battlefield, then one will be created to fight alongside her.

name: Mirror Domain
description: Dashes forward, pulling enemies to the center of her magic circle and immobilizing them there. She gains damage reduction while inside the circle, and recovers Health when she swaps locations.

name: Demon Soul
description: Basic Attacks and Skill 2 deal extra damage to single targets

name: Vortex Brand
description: Throws a ricocheting blade in the target direction, damaging and slowing enemies hit. The blade returns on hit, restoring Health and granting Move and Attack Speed.

name: Blade Tempest
description: Slashes twice, dealing damage. The second slash launches enemies and increases the damage of the next Basic Attack. Gains increased Health recovery, Mana recovery, and Movement Speed when out of combat.

name: Invincible Warrior
description: Becomes enhanced, gaining Movement Speed, max Health, Physical AttackBlock, and damaging nearby enemies over time.

name: Time for Tactics
description: Active skill hits on enemies grant 1 stack. At the max of 5 stacks, he summons prisms to attack nearby enemies.

name: Arcane Assault
description: Fires 3 orbs in a fan-shaped area, dealing damage to enemies hit.

name: Time Shift
description: Shifts in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies near the start and end points.

name: Winning Strategy
description: Channels briefly and unleashes a spirit bomb at the target enemy, dealing lethal damage. lf the bomb defeats an enemy hero, the skill's cooldown is refreshed

name: Ethereal Outburst
description: Deals area damage upon taking heavy damage in a single hit or after dying.

name: Mortals!
description: Inflicts damage and slow on enemies in the target area.

name: Join Me
description: Throws his chain hook in the target direction, damaging the enemy and pulling them to him. Upon learning this skill, gains a passive effect that increases his Health on defeats and assists.

name: Into the Void
description: Deals damage multiple times and slows enemies within range. For heroes marked by Skill 2, the slow effect is upgraded to a stun.

name: Energy Burst
description: Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Skill 1.

name: Rolling Raid
description: Rolls in the target direction, granting extra range and a piercing effect to the next Basic Attack. Gains increased Movement Speed if there are enemy heroes nearby after rolling.

name: Frag Grenade
description: Throws a grenade at the target location, damaging, marking, and sundering hit enemies. Her Basic Attack deals extra damage to marked targets.

name: Ultimate Shell
description: Fires a shell in the target direction, dealing AoE damage when enemies are hit or when exploding at max range.

name: Frozen Touch
description: Places marks on enemies when hitting them with skills, for up to 3 stacks. Upon reaching max stacks, she freezes and damages the enemy.

name: Ocean of Tears
description: Damages and launches enemies within the target area

name: Flowing Sigh
description: Fires a water orb at the target, which deals damage and bounces between nearby enemies.

name: Destructive Deluge
description: Fires a stream of water in the target direction. For a period of time after hitting an enemy hero or reaching its maximum range, the stream of water reforms into a pool, dealing damage and slowing enemies within it.

name: Hunter
description: Basic Attacks and skills deal extra true damage to targets with low Health

name: Wavebreaker
description: Lam enters “Submerged” state, greatly increasing his Movement Speed for 3 seconds. When the duration ends, Lam leaps out of the water, immediately restoring 50% of this skill’s cooldown. While in Submerged state, casting the skill again will cause Lam to surface early, dealing 300 (+120% Bonus Physical Attack) Physical Damage to nearby enemies and slowing their Movement Speed by 50% for 1.5 seconds. Passive: While in river terrain, the Submerged state has no time limit. If an enemy hero with below 30% Health appears within 1500 range, Lam gains 450 Movement Speed.

name: Space Split
description: Damages nearby enemies while gaining a mark. Basic Attacks spend marks to gain a dash and Health recovery effect. While submerged, Skill 2 has an extra dash effect.

name: Death From Below
description: Throws a dagger in the target direction, then dashes to the dagger after a short delay, dragging enemies in his path to the dagger and dealing damage to them. Submerged: Cancels the cast animation and skill delay.

name: Way of the Sword
description: Basic Attack hits grant stacks. At 4 stacks, increases Physical Attack and unlocks the Ultimate.

name: Stupor Slash
description: Dashes and leaves an after image at the start point while stunning and damaging enemies in his path.Can dash again before cooldown starts, and a third time to return to the after image.

name: Stroke of Genius
description: Removes crowd control effects from self and becomes untargetable. Damages enemies in range, leaving behind a sword formation. Enemies that touch the edge of the formation are damaged, slowed, andsundered.

name: Flickering Flurry
description: Transforms into a phantom, continuously slashing at the specified area. Li Bai is untargetable while the skill is active, and all debuffs are removed Deals AoE damage, but damage is diminished upon hitting multiple enemy heroes.

name: Ashen Razor
description: Gains EXP when hitting enemy heroes with Basic Attacks and Chaos Wave.

name: Dark Awakening
description: Transforms into Revenge form. This process cannot be interrupted and is faster at higher skill levels.

name: Void Slice
description: Gains Movement Speed and deals an extra instance of damage after each Basic Attack.

name: Force Mastery
description: Transforms into Domination Form and deals damage to nearby enemies. This process cannot be interrupted.

name: Scorched Strikes
description: After using a skill, enhances the next Basic Attack with increased range, a pierce effect, and extra damage. Hitting a target reduces all skill cooldowns.

name: Force Break
description: Transforms into Revenge Form and deals damage to nearby enemies. This process cannot be interrupted.

name: Warrior's Soul
description: Gains immunity while using skills. Gains Battle Spirit upon entering combat, using Basic Attacks or skills. Battle Spirit increases damage reduction. Attack Speed increases at max Battle Spirit. When out of combat, Battle Spirit will diminish while restoring Health.

name: Burst Ram
description: Charges in the target direction, dealing damage and launching enemies in the path. Passive: Every 2 Basic Attacks, enhances the next Basic Attack to deal extra damage.

name: Magma Slam
description: Gains a shield.Slows nearby enemies a certain range.After a brief delay, deals damage to enemies in range.

name: Tremor Smash
description: Leaps to the target location and hammers the ground 3 times. The first 2blows deal damage and slow enemies, while the 3rd blow deals damage and launches enemies.

name: Power Word - Trance
description: Every second hit on the same target within a short time will deal an extra strike of damage.

name: Power Word - Barrier
description: Summons 4 barriers that shatter when touched by an enemy, inflicting damage, stun, and slow. Damage and slowing effects are reduced for enemies that touch multiple barriers.

name: Power Word - Fate
description: Summons a magic circle that deals damage to enemies within range while granting vision of the area. Liang gains Movement Speed while inside his magic circle.

name: Power Word - Control
description: Suppresses an enemy hero, dealing damage over time. When the suppression is complete, deals damage and stun enemies in range.

name: Royal Ambition
description: Gains 1 mark every second, for up to 4 marks. Basic Attacks expend all marks, dealing additional magical damage per mark. At maximum marks, the next Basic Attack is enhanced into a ranged attack.

name: Dominator's Shield
description: Grants himself a shield. If the shield is still intact when it expires, it will deal damage to nearby enemies.

name: Staggering Charge
description: Charges up and dashes forward, damaging and stunning enemies in his path.

name: Battlefield Command
description: Provides a shield to a teammate. After a short delay, teleports to the teammate and gains Movement Speed.

name: Reinforced Shells
description: When Basic Attacks hit a hero, it increases his Physical Pierce.

name: Dual Shot
description: Increases Movement Speed and enhances the next Basic Attack to damage twice.

name: Leading the Charge
description: Dashes forward, damaging and knocking back enemies in the way.

name: Hearts and Minds
description: Removes crowd control, increases Physical Attack, and gains crowd control immunity and a shield.

name: Magnetic Barrier
description: Liu Shan's skills deal equal damage to structures and can disrupt them while also recovering Health.

name: Overcharge!
description: Gains a shield and increased Movement Speed while enhancing the next Basic Attack, dealing damage, and launching the target.

name: Robo Smash
description: Inflicts damage and stun on enemies in the target area.

name: Take It for a Spin
description: Launches a spinning attack that continuously deals damage to nearby enemies. While spinning, Basic Attacks slow and deal damage to targets.

name: Bloodthirsty Ancestry
description: Becomes enhanced when Skill 1 or Ultimate hits an enemy hero. While enhanced, Basic Attacks, Skill 1, and Ultimate deal true damage and restore Health.

name: Impaling Thrust
description: Performs a sweep attack to the target area. Restores a certain amount of Health with each enemy hero hit. Failing to hit a hero will cause the enhancement to disappear.

name: Souleater
description: Slows enemies in the target area and grants a shield for each enemy hit (upto 3 stacks). The shield value is converted to Health over time.

name: Tremble, Mortals
description: Leaps to the target location, launching and damaging enemies within range upon landing, then forming a killing field. While inside the killing field, he gains increased Physical and Magical Defense, while enemies suffer damage and slow.

name: Suppressive Fire
description: Every 5 Basic Attacks or the first Basic Attack after using a skill gains a piercing effect and deals continuous damage.

name: Blowfish Grenade
description: Throws a bomb at the target area, dealing damage and slowing all enemies hit.

name: Shark Cannon
description: Launches a rocket in the target direction, knocking back enemies in close range and dealing damage. Deals damage to enemies in range upon exploding on enemy heroes.

name: Air Support
description: Bombards the target location, slowing and dealing damage to enemies while gaining vision of the area.

name: Moonlight Dance
description: Every three Basic Attacks form a repeating cycle. On the first, she dashes toward the target, and on the third, she deals damage to nearby enemies and places a mark on them. Increasing Magical Attack also increases Attack Speed

name: Crescent Slice
description: Unleashes a shockwave in the target direction, dealing damage and marking enemies hit.

name: Searing Stab
description: Gains a shield and pulls nearby enemies, dealing damage while stunning slowing, and marking them.

name: New Moon
description: Dashes in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies in her path. Upon hitting marked enemies, her Ultimate's cooldown will be refreshed.

name: HISSATSU SHINOBI-BACHI
description: Periodically gains an enhanced Basic Attack that lets her dash while dealing damage and knocking back enemies in her path. After using an enhanced Basic Attack or any skill, she can roll and gain Movement Speed.

name: HISHOU RYUUENJIN
description: Dashes forward to deal damage and launch enemies in the target area. Recovers Energy upon hit.

name: KACHOUSEN
description: Throws her fan to damage and slow a target enemy while reducing their Magical Defense. Hits recover Energy. After it hits, the fan also deals magical damage to the closest unit behind the target.

name: CHOU HISSATSU SHINOBI-BACHI
description: Dashes forward to deal damage and knock back enemies while reducing their Physical Attack. Recovers Energy upon hitting a target.

name: Chain Reaction
description: Basic Attack and skill hits inflict stacks on the opponent, dealing extra truedamage at max stacks. Extra Attack Speed bonuses increase the number ofbullets fired by Skill 1 and 3.

name: Resplendent Revolver
description: Fires in the target direction for a period of time and gains increasedMovement Speed while firing.

name: Roaming Gun
description: Teleports in the target direction.Passive: Gains Attack and Movement Speed when a nearby enemy hero is within range.

name: Fevered Barrage
description: Shifts in the target direction and deals damage over time to nearby enemies within range.

name: Slack Off a Lil Bit
description: Recovery replaced by Slack Off, which restores Strength and Health. She will also slack off while at rest.She will not slack off when she attacks, is attacked, moves, or is in the Serious State.

name: Whatever (I)
description: Costs 1 Punch Strength. Runs forward, pulling in enemies in a cone-shaped area and damaging them.F ollow up with Skill 2 or another use of this skill for various effects.

name: Whatever (II)
description: Costs 1 Kick Strength. Jumps to dodge crowd controls and damage, and recover Health. Can follow up with Skill 2 or another use of this skill for different effects.

name: Get Serious
description: Damages nearby enemies. Recovers 1 Punch Strength and Kick Strength Bar, and increases max Strength for each by 1. Gains Movement Speed and is less affected by slow.

name: Exploit Weakness
description: Combo when using after Skill 1. Costs 1 Punch Strength. Jumps and delivers a powerful strike, damaging nearby enemies. Enemies at the center take more damage, Gains damage reduction while using the skill.

name: Feint to Retreat
description: When Whatever (II) is used quickly after Whatever (I), Mayene will deliver afluid combo of strikes, dealing physical damage to the target while pushing them backward slightly (without crowd control effects) and recovering Health.

name: Defend by Attacking
description: When Whatever (I) is used quickly after Whatever (II), Mayene will deliver a powerful strike. She teleports behind the enemy and launches a spinning kick, knocking back the target and dealing physical damage. lf the target is defeated, she recovers some Health and Strength.

name: Flee Danger
description: Combo when using after Skill 2. Costs 1 Kick Strength Jumps at the enemy, then flips in the target direction, damaging the enemy and recovering Health. Untargetable and recovers Health while using.

name: Fiery Temper
description: Cooldown is reduced when Attack Speed is increased. Gains Anger when Basic Attack and Skill 1 hit targets. At max Anger, becomes Excited, enhancing all skills. While Excited, surplus Anger restores Health.

name: Awesome Barrage
description: Uses the Apocalyptor to strafe continuously and deal damage. '''Excited:''' Bullets have a piercing effect, dealing half damage to subsequent enemies.

name: Heavy Shot
description: Shoots a heavy round in the target direction, inflicting damage and slow. Upon hitting an obstacle or reaching its max range, it will split into splinters that deal damage. '''Excited:''' Increases the number of splinters.

name: Missile Mayhem
description: Scans the vicinity and fires missiles at enemies within range who are attacked by teammates, dealing damage. '''Excited:''' Reduces interval between missiles.

name: Dream-eating
description: Gains Mass when using skills. Mass increases his Physical Attack, Physical Defense, and Magical Defense.

name: Lingering Dream
description: Gains Mass and a shield while damaging enemies in range. Basic Attack hits reduce this skill's cooldown.

name: Dream Bubble
description: Launches a bubble in the target direction, then pulls it back. He does thistwice. The bubble damages and slows enemies hit.The bubble can be launched again as a bomb in the target direction, damaging enemies.

name: Dream Roam
description: Flies in a circle, dealing magical damage to enemies in his path and gaining. Mass all the while. When he stops flying, he launches and damages nearby enemies.

name: Eternal Youth
description: Summons a shadow servant that damages enemies and restores Health to her whenever using a skill. She also gains Shadow Power that boosts her Movement Speed and healing effects.

name: Dark Transfer
description: Unleashes shadow energy, dealing damage to enemies that come into contact with it. Upon using the skill again, will shift to the shadow's location, dealing damage again. A shadow servant will be summoned if she hits an enemy after shifting.

name: Ravenous Tether
description: Releases a tether that links to the first enemy hit. Damages and slows over time. Steals Physical and Magical Attack while recovering Health.

name: Umbral Moon
description: Removes debuffs, gains Movement Speed, and becomes untargetable. Deals damage to nearby enemies upon entering and exiting the untargetable state.

name: Mechanical Minions
description: Summons minions upon killing a unit. Minions attack automatically, then merge into an advanced bot or explode at the end of their duration, dealing damage to nearby enemies.

name: Air Superiority
description: Commands her aircraft to move in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies in its path. Using the skill again splits the aircraft in two, dealing damage and inflicting slow.

name: Forced Invasion
description: Summons mechanical minions in the target area, dealing area damage before automatically attacking nearby enemies.

name: Chaos Field
description: Marks a target enemy or structure, damaging them over time. Non-structures are also stunned and slowed. Nearby mechanical minions are enhanced while marks are active. Marks explode upon expiry, dealing damage proportional to the damage taken while marked.

name: Good Omens
description: Every 5s, Ming's next Basic Attack deals more magical damage and heals himself and the linked teammate. The healing is reduced if the enemy is nota hero.

name: Time - Carefree
description: Forms a link with the target. When linked to an ally, increases the Physical and Magical Attack Movement Speed, and Attack Speed of both parties. When linked to an enemy unit, reduces their Physical and Magical Attack while dealing damage over time.

name: Mastery - Glide
description: Switches the effect of the link. When linked to an ally, increases the Physical and Magical Defense of both parties. When linked to an enemy unit, reduces their Physical and Magical Defense. The effect can beswitched repeatedly.

name: Peace - Longevity
description: While linked, can spend own Health to restore an equal amount of Health toallies or deal an equal amount of damage to enemies. Recovers Health continuously while out of combat.

name: Fight for Peace
description: Every 4th Basic Attack deals area damage and knocks back enemies. Gains shield stacks when using skills, for up to 3 stacks.

name: Peacebringer
description: Dashes in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies along the way. The next Basic Attack is enhanced, becoming Fight for Peace.

name: Cannon Blast
description: Fires a shell in the target direction, stunning and dealing AoE damage to the 1st enemy hit. The shell leaves a crater in the ground after reaching its max range or hitting an enemy, dealing damage over time to enemies that step init.

name: Think Inside the Box
description: Deals continuous damage to enemies within a certain range of himself, stunning enemies every time he deals damage.

name: Great Wall Guardian (Dual Swords Form)
description: Gains Movement Speed when using dual swords. Skills and Basic Attacks apply marks to enemies. At 5 stacks, the marks disappear, dealing damage and inflicting silence and slow on the enemy.

name: Snaking Strike
description: Dashes twice in the target direction, and the direction of the 2nd dash can be controlled. Deals damage to enemies in her path. lf the skill hits an enemy, she can use it again before it enters cooldown.

name: Dagger Waltz
description: Throws a light sword in the target direction, slowing and dealing damage to enemies in range when it reaches max range. When Hua Mulan reaches the light sword, she puts it away, reducing thecooldown of Dagger Waltz.

name: Blooming Blade (Dual Swords Form)
description: Deals damage to enemies within range, gaining damage reduction during this time. Enhances herself, gaining Physical Attack during the enhancement. Switches to Heavy Sword Form.

name: Great Wall Guardian (Heavy Sword Form)
description: Gains Movement Speed when using dual swords. Skills and Basic Attacks apply marks to enemies. At 5 stacks, the marks disappear, dealing damage and inflicting silence and slow on the enemy.

name: Sundering Slash
description: Damages and slows enemies in range. Charges up the skill for greater damage, slow, and even launch. This skill can be used again on hit.

name: Blade Flurry (Mulan)
description: Slashes up to 4 times in the specified direction, with each slash slowing knocking back, and dealing damage to any enemies hit.

name: Blooming Blade (Heavy Blade Form)
description: Deals damage to enemies in range. Enhances herself, gaining Attack Speed while enhanced. Switches to Dual Swords Form.

name: Niten Ichiryuu
description: Using skills generates Vigor, which is consumed by Basic Attacks to gain enhancement effects. Hitting an enemy reduces the cooldown of Skills 1 and Skills 2. Vigor can stack up to two times. 1 Vigor: Enhances Basic Attack damage. 2 Vigor: Dashes and slows enemies.

name: Illuminating Slash
description: Unleashes sword energy in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies in its path and knocking down projectiles. Becomes immune to crowd control when using the skill.

name: Extreme Speed
description: Dashes in the target direction, dealing damage and gaining a shield upon hitting an enemy.

name: Duel to the Death
description: Dashes to the target, launching them and dealing damage to enemies within range, while delaying the target's recovery effects.

name: DANCING SWORD ARTS
description: After hitting an enemy with a skill, the next Basic Attack is enhanced, dealing extra damage.

name: AMUBE YATORO
description: Deals damage to a targeted enemy and marks the target. Her attacks can trigger the mark to deal extra damage.

name: RERA MUTSUBE
description: Dashes in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies in her path. Recovers Health for each enemy hit.

name: KAMUI MUTSUBE
description: Gains Movement Speed. Using the skill again deals damage to enemies in the target area, slows them, and reduces their attack.

name: Scorching Ember
description: Gains Movement Speed and a shield that negates true damage when attacking the enemy.

name: Fire-tipped Spear - Sweep
description: Attacks nearby enemies, dealing damage. This attack also weakens the recovery capability of heroes and deals true damage over time.

name: Red Armillary Sash - Bind
description: Flips behind the target to deal damage.

name: Universe Ring
description: Unleashes the universe ring, dealing damage to enemy heroes across the entire map and gaining vision. Enhances the range of Universe Ring - Skyfall to cover the entire map for 5s.

name: Divine Consciousness
description: Gains enhanced vision and range when leveling up.

name: Divine Glow - Creation
description: Unleashes energy that deals damage, knocks back enemies, and creates a matrix. When the energy stops, it expands to deal extra damage.

name: Divine Glow - Coalescence
description: Creates a matrix and allows her to teleport. The matrix blocks enemy heroes' movement. Matrices can be fused twice.

name: Divine Glow - Emergence
description: Teleports to the target area after a short delay. Generates a shield, gains Movement Speed, deals damage, and slows the enemy. Passive: Magical Attack can reduce cast time.

name: Divine Glow - Annihilation
description: Deals damage to targets ahead.

name: Blast
description: In human form, Basic Attacks have increased range and deal extra magical damage while recovering Energy. Consecutive hits on the same target will stack damage.

name: Striker Stance
description: Fires Inner Energy in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies in its path and slowing them. Recovers Energy upon hit.

name: Guarding Stance
description: Grants shield points and increases Attack SpeedDeals damage to enemies in range, and continuously deals damage for aperiod of time.

name: Tiger Form
description: Switches to tiger form, gaining Movement Speed and enhancing the next 2 Basic Attacks. The 1st Basic Attack lets him dash toward a locked-on target, damaging and slowing them. The 2nd Basic Attack deals magical damage.

name: Beastly Instincts
description: Gains extra Physical Attack, Physical Defense, Magical Defense, and Movement Speed while in tiger form.

name: Roaring Tiger Stance
description: Bites enemies, dealing damage. Restores Energy when this attack kills the enemy.

name: Leaping Tiger Stance
description: Pounces in the target direction. lf runs into terrain, latches onto it brieflyand can pounce again.lf the pounce hits an enemy, he damages, recovers Energy, and reduces this skill's cooldown.

name: Human Form
description: Switches to human form, gains Movement Speed and enhances the next Basic Attack. Deals damage to the target and enemies in a cone-shaped area behind them.

name: Firefly Protection
description: Basic Attacks and skills summon fireflies that deal extra damage to enemies and grant vision of them. Periodically heals teammates. Can charge up his Basic Attack to heal himself.

name: Mulberry Power
description: Launches and damages enemies in front while summoning fireflies to heal teammates or damage enemies.

name: Ride the Wind
description: Flies to a brush while summoning fireflies that heal teammates or damage enemies.

name: Firefly Fields
description: Summons a brush and can fly into it by using this skill again. The brush summons fireflies over time that heal teammates or damage enemies.

name: Piercing Brush
description: Enhances every 3rd Basic Attack, causing it to deal pierce damage. Deals damage when brush strokes of different skills come in contact. Touching Brush Power grants enhanced Basic Attack and Health restoration.

name: Ink Burst
description: Swipes the brush in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies in the path. Extra damage is dealt at max distance.

name: Seething Script
description: Summons a brush to write at the target location, dealing damage andslowing enemies in the path.

name: Finishing Stroke
description: Dashes forward, damaging enemies in the path. Can dash again upon coming into contact with an enemy or brushstroke. Dash 3-5 times to become untargetable and damage nearby enemies multiple times.

name: Maiden's Trick
description: The farther away the enemy is, the more damage skills deal.

name: Silk Imprint
description: Throws her artifact, damaging enemies and pulling them toward it. Can be used again to pull the enemy in the target direction.

name: Silky Beauty
description: Releases an energy orb that continuously deals damage to enemies within range for a short time, and then explodes to deal additional damage. Enemies are slowed the first time the orb hits them.

name: Sole Focus
description: Resets Skill 2's cooldown and enhances herself. While enhanced, gains Movement Speed and reduces Skill 2's cooldown by half. Skill 1 can pull the enemy twice.

name: Accuracy
description: Basic Attacks deal extra damage, and Critical Rate is converted into Physical Attack. Extra Critical Rate increases Basic Attack damage. When out of combat and next to a wall, gains disguise and Movement Speed.

name: The Tranquil Eye
description: Plants a device that continuously grants vision Passive: Gains increased Physical Pierce when standing still, but loses it when moving.

name: Wild Wind
description: Fires in the target direction, damaging and slowing the target hit.

name: Getaway
description: Leaps backwards and fires in the target direction, damaging and slowing the target hit while gaining Movement Speed. Rounds stocked are shared with Skill 2. Passive: Increases Basic Attack range.

name: Quiet Whispers
description: Gains vision of casters within range. Using this skill will enhance his Basic Attack and deal damage.

name: Death Descends
description: Releases a shockwave over the target area, dealing damage to enemies upon landing.

name: Hourglass of Time
description: Gains a Movement Speed bonus after using skills.

name: Time Bomb
description: Fires a bomb in the target direction, which deals damage and attaches itself to the hit enemy. After a brief delay, inflicts AoE damage and slow.

name: Time Flux
description: Timebender and nearby teammates within range gain increased Movement Speed. When the effect ends, restores Health equal to 25% of the damage taken while the effect was active. Passive: Gains Cooldown Reduction.

name: Time Lapse
description: Throws a bomb in the target direction, inflicting AoE damage, slow, and silence upon coming in contact with an enemy or reaching its max range. After a brief delay, the bomb deals AoE damage again.

name: Raging Tide
description: The next Basic Attack periodically deals extra damage and restores Health Gains 1 stack every time the skill deals damage, or every time he receives physical or true damage (up to 10 stacks). Each stack increases Physical Defense.

name: Wave Render
description: Dashes in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies in his path and dealing AoE damage on arrival. After a short delay, launches enemies and deals them damage.

name: Typhoon
description: Strides forward and sweeps enemies in front, dealing damage and slowing them. Sweeps an extra 2 times before the skill goes into cooldown.

name: Set Sail!
description: Pilots a boat forward while lmmune. lt can carry 1 teammate. When it runs into terrain or certain enemies, it explodes, damages, launches, and sunders. lf he bails out early, it'll coast for a bit.

name: CONCEALED SABRE HAZY BLADE
description: Every 5–4s, Ukyo Tachibana gains one enhanced Basic Attack that has increased range, restores Health, deals extra damage, and slows enemies. Dealing skill damage shortens the enhanced Basic Attack's cooldown.

name: CONCEALED SABRE SWALLOW SWIPE
description: Ukyo Tachibana creates a domain around himself, then leaps backward, dealing damage to enemies in his path. This skill can be used again after 2s, or immediately if it hits a target. If he returns to the starting point of phase 1 after using phase 2, phase 2 is enhanced.

name: CONCEALED SABRE HEAVENLY HACK
description: Slashes in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies within range. Enemies at the edge of the skill's range will be stunned.

name: CONCEALED SABRE SNOWFALL SLASH
description: Slashes 4 times in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies within range. Recovers Health each time damage is dealt.

name: Whirling Featherblades
description: Mark Damage When attacking at a distance, Basic Attacks throw a blade that returns to her. She can hit the blade as it returns to bounce it back at the enemy, dealing increased damage with each rebound. When attacking nearby targets, she enters melee mode and attacks faster. Basic Attacks mark targets. Marked enemies take extra damage from Skill 2.

name: Feverish Dance
description: Enhance Damage Slow Sweeps the surrounding area, damaging and slowing nearby enemies. Then enters Frenzied state, gaining a major boost to Movement Speed and Attack Speed.

name: Feathered Tempest
description: Damage Recovery Movement Dashes forward, damaging and knocking back enemies. Also triggers Featherblade marks and spreads them to nearby enemies. Then, throws rebounding blades at enemies in front, dealing damage and recovering Health. Each hit consumes 1 mark to deal extra damage.

name: Final Frenzy
description: Indomitable Enhance Damage Damages nearby enemies and gains Movement Speed. Also enters the Indomitable state for 4s, gaining temporary Health. If she is defeated while this skill is not on cooldown, she resurrects after a short delay, damaging nearby enemies. The skill will then enter cooldown. '''Passive:''' Upgrading this skill increases Skill 2 and melee Basic Attack damage. The Indomitable state ends immediately if she loses all of her temporary Health.

name: Frozen Heart
description: Upon leaving combat, gains a shield that chills the attacker when taking damage. When the shield disappears, deals damage to nearby enemies. Every third Basic Attack is enhanced, inflicting extra damage and chill effects.

name: Shattered Ice
description: Damages and slows enemies in the target area while granting vision of Them.

name: Frigid Prison
description: After a brief delay, freezes enemies in the target area and slows them. Attacks on frozen targets deal extra damage.

name: Winter is Here
description: Continuously inflicts damage and slow on enemies in the target area.

name: The Great Sage
description: Using skills enhances the next Basic Attack to a dash strike that deals extra damage. Base Critical Rate increases, but Critical Damage decreases.

name: Protective Shroud
description: Gains increased Movement Speed and blocks the damage and effects of the next enemy hero skill. After a successful block, gains temporary invulnerability to damage andskills, as well as a shield.

name: Furious Advance
description: Wukong shifts in the target direction. Hitting units during the shift will trigger another shift and grant a Movement Speed boost. The shift deals damage to monsters, and grievous damage to monsters at low Health.

name: Golden Cudgel
description: Launches enemies in range, damaging and placing 3 marks on them. BasicAttack removes 1 mark and deals extra damage every time.

name: Petrifying Strike
description: Skills and Basic Attacks have a chance to petrify enemy heroes.

name: Storm and Stress
description: Dashes to the target location and enhances the next Basic Attack to inflict extra damage and slow.

name: Shock and Awe
description: Deals damage to enemies in the specified area.

name: Hurricane Hammer
description: Swings the hammer for a period of time, continuously dealing damage to nearby enemies in range. Gains increased Movement Speed and a shield while the skill is used. Passive: Grants shield periodically.

name: Resolute Will
description: Gains damage immunity when Health falls below 30%. Basic Attacks deal extra damage to different units every 5s.

name: Righteous Fervor
description: Dashes forward and knocks back enemies. At the end of the dash, launches the enemy and deals damage.

name: No Retreat
description: Slows nearby enemies in range and reduces their damage output while dealing damage.Passive: Gains extra Health for every extra point of Physical Defense.

name: Hegemon's Slash
description: Deals damage to enemies in the target direction. Inflicts extra damage andstun on enemies close by.The lower his Health, the higher the damage.He gains invulnerability whilethe skill is being released, preventing his Health from falling below 1.

name: Encouraging Thoughts
description: Hitting enemies with skills enhances herself, increasing her Movement Speed.

name: Blossoming Fan
description: Throws fan in the target direction, which returns to her upon reaching max range, damaging enemies in its path both ways.

name: Honeysweet Breeze
description: Deals damage to enemies in the target area and launches them.

name: Meteor Storm
description: Summons meteors, dealing damage to nearby enemies in range.

name: Crazed Prelude
description: Deals extra damage to enemies at long range and slows them, while gaining a Movement Speed boost.

name: Flailing Sickles
description: Dashes in the target direction, pulling enemies marked by his sickle a certain distance. Also enhances his next Basic Attack.

name: Nightmare Hooks
description: Charges up and gains Movement Speed. After charging, he throws the sickle to immobilize enemies and deal damage, marking the first enemy hit. Using the skill again will pull back and damage the marked enemy.

name: Crimson Blur
description: Dashes behind a target marked by his sickle, dealing damage. Beyond a certain range, he moves toward the target instead. If he has not marked a target, the hook latches onto one, dealing damage. Takes 50% less damage during the dash. Passive: Kills and assists grant Movement Speed and Attack Speed, up to 3 stacks.

name: Mind Games
description: Yang Jian's Resistance increases for each nearby enemy hero.

name: Unleash the Hound
description: Yang Jian commands a Heaven Hound to dash in the target direction, marking and dealing damage to the first enemy hit. Upon using again, Yang Jian dashes to the marked enemy and deals damage to them.

name: Vain Disillusionment
description: Yang Jian deals damage to enemies in front of him and stuns them while reducing their Movement Speed. if an enemy is hit, his Basic Attack is enhanced to deal extra damage.

name: Sight of Origin
description: Yang Jian unleashes a beam of light in the target direction, dealing damage and recovering Health.

name: Occult Arts - Manipulation
description: PuppetRecovery Chance gaining Hero Shards and recover Health when attacking. Collect 50 Hero Shards (up until 150 stocks, can auto-stock every certain seconds) to summon the corresponding hero.

name: Occult Arts - Umbra
description: PuppetCrowd ControlMovement Throws the puppet, dealing damage and launching enemies in the path, then begins controlling the puppet.

name: Occult Arts - Zhi Chu Luan
description: Damage Reduction Tosses paper birds, which deal damage to enemies in their path.

name: Occult Arts - Shadow Crucifixion
description: MovementSlow Releases several strings, dealing damage to targets hit. Repeated hits additionally inflict slow.

name: Occult Arts - Dispersal
description: MovementCleanse Vanishes, cleansing all crowd control effects, then reappearing in the target location after a brief delay.

name: Occult Arts - Return
description: RetrieveCrowd Control Retrieves the puppet immediately, dealing damage to enemies along the path and launching them.

name: Occult Arts - Substitution
description: Location Swap Swap positions with the puppet, dealing damage to enemies in the path.

name: Occult Arts - Binding
description: SlowCrowd Control Phase 1: Damages and slows nearby enemies. Phase 2: Continuously stuns and damages enemies.

name: Occult Arts - Breakout
description: Movement The puppet dashes in the target direction and pulls its master to itself, dealing damage to enemies in the path.

name: Gift of the Stars
description: Recovers Health when landing skill hits. Using any 3 skills enhances his next skill, and using the enhanced skill will enhance his next Basic Attack.

name: Starlight Slice
description: Deals damage to nearby enemies.

name: Starburn (Yao)
description: Moves quickly, dealing damage and slowing enemies in his path.

name: Return to Dust
description: Returns to his location 2s ago, removes Star Reduction, and deals damage to enemies in his path. Passive: Some of his damage taken is converted into Star Reduction after a short delay.

name: Brilliance: Starlight Slice
description: Deals damage to nearby enemies.

name: Brilliance: Starburn
description: Moves quickly, dealing damage and slowing enemies in his path.

name: Brilliance: Return to Dust
description: Returns to his location 2s ago, removes Star Reduction, and deals damage to enemies in his path. Passive: Some of his damage taken is converted into Star Reduction after a short delay.

name: Deer Spirit
description: When inflicted with crowd control effects (excluding suppression), gains immunity to all effects.

name: Wandering Beam
description: Releases a spirit in the target direction, which tracks nearby enemies after reaching its max range.The spirit launches and deals damage to enemies hit. In deer spirit form, using this skill will restore her to Human Form.

name: Accelerating Blitz
description: Deals continuous damage to nearby enemies. Attached: Increases casting range.

name: Verdant Protector
description: Attaches herself to a teammate, providing a true damage shield and enhancing your skill effects. Attached: When the shield is exhausted, the attachment will end and enter cooldown. Actively detaching reduces the cooldown of this skill.

name: Spear Will - Sweeping Fire
description: Skills grant marks (up to 3 stacks), and different stacks upgrade thefollowing Basic Attacks into different skills.

name: Moonslash
description: Deals damage to enemies within range and launches them.

name: Cloudchaser
description: Dashes to the target location then sweeps the enemy, slowing them and dealing damage. Skill can be charged to enhance damage and gain extra effects

name: Starburn
description: Dashes in the target direction, damaging and launching enemies. Then returns to the start point to damage and pull enemies a short distance. Gains lmmunity and damage reduction while using. Use again to deal continuous damage to the target area.

name: Stalwart - Peacemaker
description: Continuously deals damage to enemies within range and gains a shield.

name: Zealous - Devastation
description: Delivers 3 consecutive attacks, dealing damage and recovering Health.

name: Zenith - Wildfire
description: Gains Movement Speed and damage reduction, and can ignore terrain. Then deals damage to enemies.

name: Maintaining Initiative
description: Basic Attacks deal magical damage. For every 4 skill hits on the same enemy, generates a Weiqi stone that deals magical damage and adds to the total number of Weiqi stones. Gains brief immunity to all damage and increased Movement Speed upon taking fatal damage.

name: Sliding Stones
description: Places a Weiqi stone at the target location, gaining vision and damaging enemies. Weiqi stones will be pulled into Skill 2's Weiqi formation, damaging and slowing enemies in their path.

name: Taking Liberties
description: Deals damage to the target area and creates a Weiqi formation. The formation pulls enemies toward its center, damaging them in the process.

name: The World is My Board
description: Draws a Weiqi board that launches enemies and places marks on them while exposing their location. Enemies caught within the Weiqi board are bound and will be unable to leave. When the Weiqi board is fully formed, his Movement Speed is increased.

name: Poignant Melodies
description:
Changes the melody to produce different skill effects.
War: Skills deal damage to nearby enemies.
Peace: Skills heal nearby allies.

name: Tragic Beauty
description: Damages and slows nearby targets. Her next Basic Attack will deal more damage.

name: Mournful Tempo
description: Gains Movement Speed, and after a brief delay, inflicts damage and stun on enemies in the target area.

name: Melody of Peace
description: Changes the melody to Peace, in which skills restore Health to nearby allies.

name: Dark Potential
description: Human Form: Hits from Basic Attacks and skills grant madness. Ferali Form: Casting the skill reduces the Movement Speed of enemies in range.

name: Forbidden Domain
description: Deals damage to enemies in range. Knocks back enemy heroes.

name: Leaping Savior
description: Jumps to the target location, granting a shield to nearby teammates. Gains extra Madness for every teammate he shields.

name: Unbridled Outburst
description: Roars and transforms, gaining brief Invincibility, then a shield. The roar forms a gust of wind that damages, knocks back, and stuns enemies. While inside the wind, Zhang Fei gains increased Movement Speed

name: Mad Slaughter
description: Deals damage to targets ahead.

name: Stampede
description: Jumps to the target area, dealing damage to nearby enemies.

name: Blaze
description: Damage from Basic Attacks and skills apply marks to enemy units andstructures. At 4 stacks, targets are slowed and suffer damage over time.

name: Wildfire
description: Invokes a wind domain in the target direction, slowing and knocking back enemies in range. Nearby teammates gain Move Speed, and his nearby fires will spread in the direction of the wind.

name: Scorching Bolt
description: Creates a fire domain at the target location that deals burning damage toenemies in it. There can be up to 5 fire domains at a time. He recovers Health over time while in a fire domain. Can stock up to 3 charges of this skill.

name: Flames of War
description: Deals damage to enemies in range. lf there's a fire zone in range, any enemies within it will be stunned and take extra damage.

name: Nature's Will
description: Periodically removes crowd control effects and increases Movement Speed and damage reduction.

name: Kaleidoscope
description: Triggers Nature's Will, releasing dream butterflies in a fan-shaped area, inflicting damage and slowing enemies in range.

name: Sleep Starts
description: Deals damage to enemies in range and increases ally Movement Speed Grants a stack each time dealing damage, up to 5 stacks. Each stack increases skill damage. Passive: Periodically casts Sleep Starts.

name: Butterfly Effect
description: Removes crowd controls from allies within range and increases shield.

name: Dragon's Roar
description: The lower his Health, the greater his damage reduction and skills.

name: Thunderbreaker
description: Zilong charges forward, dealing damage and enhancing his next Basic Attack. This skill's cooldown is reset whenever his Health reaches a certain level.

name: Stormpiercer
description: Jabs repeatedly in the target direction, dealing damage. Recovers Health on hit.

name: Skysplitter
description: Leaps to the target area, damaging and launching enemies in the center.

name: Sanctification (Ziya)
description: When Ziya deals damage to a target and they are defeated within 4s, he gains EXP. When reaching level, he gains Sanctify, and increases his level cap to 25. Sanctify allows him to increase a teammate's level cap, and potentially earn EXP.

name: Divine Seal
description: Seals enemies within range, dealing magical damage while reducing their Movement Speed, Physical and Magical Defense for 3.5s. If the skill hits an enemy, he gains a Movement Speed boost.

name: Divine Punishment
description: Conjures a magic circle that deals 3 strikes of damage to nearby enemies. After a short delay, the magic circle explodes, dealing extra magical damage and launching enemies for 0.8s.

name: Universal Law
description: Unleashes 3 shockwaves to deal magical damage. Reaching level 15 increases the Ultimate's charging speed by 10% and grants a chance to allow him to move after initiating the charge.
